aboutDescription: PRIVA AI is an advanced, sovereign sandbox platform engineered for secure data interaction. It provides a private environment where your data remains localized, ensuring total privacy while utilizing intelligent document processing, high-precision OCR, and context-aware AI analysis.
supportDescription: For technical assistance, email us at:
howToAccessDesc: Log in with your credentials to enter the secure dashboard.
howToVerifyDesc: Complete the initial system handshake for identity verification.
howToUploadDesc: Drag and drop your documents (PDF/Images) into the Knowledge Base; the system automatically performs OCR and indexing.
howToAnalyzeDesc: Use the AI Chat to ask questions, summarize documents, or extract specific data from your uploaded files.
howToManageDesc: Monitor your remaining queries and storage status directly from the dashboard sidebar.
sandboxDescription: Explore sovereign AI in a secure sandbox before full onboarding.
usersLimitReached: Users limit reached. Please contact the administrator to upgrade your plan.
pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errorPageDesc: Something went wrong on our end. You can try refreshing or head back home.
dropToRoot: Drop here to move document to root
createFoldersFromRoot: Create folders from the root view
dragFileToFolder: Drag a file onto a folder to move it.
dropOnRootSuffix: or go back to move into another folder.
noDocumentsHint: Create a folder or upload a file to build your knowledge base.
folderEmptyHint: Upload a document here. Chat in this folder will only use files inside it.
dragToFolder: Drag to a folder to move
